reconciliation.method: Option A (PDF rent roll = occupancy spine). xlsx workpapers NOT readable in this environment; AR reconciled against printed rent-roll subtotals and cross-checked to GL AR-Residents.

delinquency.note: Gross carried at GL 1300. Prepay is a distinct offsetting field, never silently netted.

pending_future.note: Leased-not-moved-in + applicants. Excluded from Delinquency. Intent balances are future-dated charges, not current AR.
